41. Moola Dasa
Order of the scheme, Satyas view, auspicious periods, inauspicious periods, effects of the Moon,
aspects to the Moon at the commencement of a Dasha, major Lords placement at the
commencement of a Dasha, special effects based on Navansa, Lagna Dasha, Naisargika Dasha,
effects of adverse and favourable planets Dasha, different kinds of Dashas of the Luminaries
based on their dispositions, other placements of planets
42. Effects of Sub-Periods
Distribution of sub-periods to planets in Moola Dasa, Dasa-Bhuktis thereof, special considerations
43. Evil Effects of Dasa
44. Antidotes for Evil Dashas
45. Effects of Planetary Dignities
Effects of exalted planets, planets in Mlatrikona, own Signs, friendly Signs, debilitation Signs,
inimical Signs, effects in Navansa, more planets in exaltation, in Mlatrikona, in own Signs, friendly
Signs, inimical Signs and debilitation
46. Female Horoscopy
